title: Mailchimp vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Mailchimp vs Moosend: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between Mailchimp and Moosend comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Mailchimp is built for beginners and small businesses, while Moosend targets small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_b: Small Businesses Wanting Unlimited Emails At Low Cost

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on beginners and small businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Mailchimp wins for beginners and small businesses, while Moosend is stronger for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend starts at a lower price point ($9/mo vs $13/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Moosend to Mailchimp is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
